templates.text: The dungeon counts too. It arrived at a different answer — but it has been counting longer.
That number is carved into the wall three rooms below. The dungeon anticipated the question.
Numbers have weight in the deep. The stone records them differently from words — more precisely, less forgivingly.
Precision. The dungeon respects precision. Approximation is how things get forgotten.
The dungeon has counted the dead using numbers like that. It does not share the totals. The totals are not encouraging.
